aeo_readiness.summary: Eddie's Heating and Air Conditioning has a basic level of AEO readiness with some critical areas for improvement. The website includes essential service information and contact details but lacks customer reviews and detailed content to build authority.
quick_wins: Encourage satisfied customers to leave Google reviews to build credibility and improve local search presence.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, customer testimonials, and a blog with relevant industry topics.
Implement a clear call-to-action on the homepage to improve conversion rates.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes the business name, address, and phone number (NAP) on the contact page, but there is no structured NAP on every page.
gbp_analysis.summary: The website partially implements Google Business Profile (GBP) best practices, but the lack of consistent NAP and customer reviews are significant drawbacks.
critical_issues: No visible Google reviews or integration with GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP citations are incomplete and inconsistently formatted across the website, which can negatively impact local search rankings.
action_items: Ensure the NAP is consistently formatted across the entire website, including the footer and contact page.
List the business on major local directories (e.g., Yelp, Yellow Pages) with consistent NAP information.
Claim and verify the Google Business Profile to manage and respond to customer reviews.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and detailed content to build authority and trust.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Potential customers searching for HVAC services in Katy, Texas, due to low online visibility and lack of reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and expanding website content to include relevant keywords and topics.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative content (e.g., blog posts, guides) that establishes Eddie's Heating and Air Conditioning as an expert in the HVAC industry.

page_title: AC Repair In Katy, TX - Heating Services & AC Replacement - Eddie's Heating & Air Conditioning
